claims.claim: 14 days full access, no card needed, cancel anytime
Refer another business owner, both get a free month, tracked in-platform
Tool sprawl (separate CRM, texting, booking, reviews) creates gaps where leads go cold

disclosure: Based on widely cited lead response time research showing contact and qualification rates fall sharply after the first few minutes.

claims.text: Responding within 5 minutes can double close rate compared to slower response times
Owners often attribute a low close rate to sales skill rather than response speed
